prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GW4D20T** (2.0L turbocharged diesel, 140-190hp stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbo upgrade, supporting 300whp on E85 with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** fuel injectors for precise fueling control.

Full **Forge Motorsport** cooling system overhaul: **3-core aluminum radiator**, **oil cooler kit (19-row)**, and **intercooler upgrade (GReddy Type-S)** to handle sustained boost levels up to 28psi on the GW4D20T.

Custom **6-speed manual transmission swap** from the **Great Wall Haval H9** with a **PPG close-ratio gear set (1st: 3.545, 2nd: 2.045, 3rd: 1.370)** and **South Bend Clutch Stage 3** for 400+ lb-ft torque capacity, paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** for improved off-road and on-road traction.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3-inspired widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for Wingle 7) with **carbon fiber fender flares**, **aluminum side skirts**, and a **dual-layer rear diffuser** for aggressive stance and aero efficiency.

**OEM+ lighting upgrade**: **Morimoto XB LED headlights** with **CBI Offroad LED light bars (30-inch curved)** integrated into the front bumper, paired with **custom sequential LED taillights** (inspired by Audi RS6) for a modern JDM/Euro hybrid look.

**Rotiform LAS-R 18x9 +15 wheels** in matte bronze with **BFGoodrich KM3 285/65R18 tires** for off-road dominance, combined with a **KW Suspension Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable)** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro)** for precise handling and lift capability.
